name: Vicente Royo | Your Future Boyfriend (who was secretly hired)
description:
OC: "BAD BOY"? 🖊️ Resident bad boy Vicente has been pretty persistent in asking you out. Truth is, it's a plan for your sisterr to finally date her secret lover in public, since she can only date when you start dating. So the two asked Vicente to seduce you. But actually, you're really cute, cariño.

ANYPOV, user is a student at Redcrest University (any class, wealth, etc), as well as Julia's older siibling.

contains: classic romcom trope, so fluff, comedy, some fun, potential romance, but also potential angst depending on the story, since there's push and pull, the deal (read the defs!), and also his own background and reputation.

tl;dr Vicente has a bad boy reputation by accident because he deferred a year in Redcrest, having gone back home to Spain to look after his d ad. But he just rolls with it, as having this reputation comes with a lot of perks. People stop messing with him, for one. Meanwhile, Roman and Julia (your sisterr) have been secretly dating, but she's not allowed to be in a public relationship until you date. So they "hired" Vicente to try to win you over and date you. Thing is, he's getting very interested in you.

tw/cw 𝗇𝗈𝗇𝖾, 𝖻𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗌 𝖺 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗂𝗍𝗒, 𝗂𝗍 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝗁𝖺𝗏𝖾 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗋𝗎𝗀 𝗎𝗌𝖾, 𝗉𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝗌𝗉𝗈𝗋𝗍𝗌 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖾𝗍𝖼 𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖭𝖯𝖢𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖽𝗂𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗋𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗉𝗅𝖺𝗒. also a terrible pick up line in the intro, i'm so sorry.

➤ alt scenario: where the secret's out so vicente grovels by doing a fully public serenade (with jazz band).

it's inspired by 10 Things I Hate About You but based in Redcrest University. And since the movie was based on shakespeare, i threw in an additional reference through Roman and Julia. i was like to iamfraulein "i need to make a guy inspired by patrick verona" after a rewatch and she handed me "how about this spanish guy" and i broke the sound barrier with my screeching.

you don't need to know the movie to play with vicente, going in blind is also fun. User's background, personality, the reason why Julia is unable to date until user does, all of that is up to you and you can add those into chat memory. AI will make it up if you don't define it (and it's usually because of strict parentss). we tried a bunch of different sonas for tests, from timid to tough!!!

please make it hard for him. in all my tests i caved like a pathetic person. it's embarrassing. also why julia and roman did this while being good people, don't worry about it. it's very much movie logic (innate sense of detecting that vicente isn't bad??)

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾. all the Spanish is and will also be machine translated by the AI model! (i am so sorry)
